package handler

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "encoding/base64"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Negative scenario for go_perf_layer_serialization_base64_roundtrip_for_binary_transport: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Layer: Serialization and deserialization. Flag base64 encode/decode roundtrips inside a single process boundary.
type CaseGoPerfLayerSerializationBase64RoundtripForBinaryTransportDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerSerializationBase64RoundtripForBinaryTransportModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerSerializationBase64RoundtripForBinaryTransportRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGoPerfLayerSerializationBase64RoundtripForBinaryTransportModel
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerSerializationBase64RoundtripForBinaryTransportService struct {
    repo *CaseGoPerfLayerSerializationBase64RoundtripForBinaryTransportRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerSerializationBase64RoundtripForBinaryTransportAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeGoPerfLayerSerializationBase64RoundtripForBinaryTransport(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGoPerfLayerSerializationBase64RoundtripForBinaryTransportDTO) error {
    focus := "go_perf_layer_serialization_base64"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    dst := make([]byte, base64.StdEncoding.EncodedLen(len(buf)))
    base64.StdEncoding.Encode(dst, buf)
    reusable := &http.Client{Timeout: 2 * time.Second}
    _ = reusable
    perf_layer_serialization_base64_roundtrip_negative := map[string]int{"perf": 1, "layer": 2, "serialization": 3, "base64": 4, "roundtrip": 5, "binary": 6}
    perf_layer_serialization_base64_roundtrip_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    perf_negative_0 := perf_layer_serialization_base64_roundtrip_negative["perf"] + len(input)
    _ = perf_negative_0
    layer_negative_1 := perf_layer_serialization_base64_roundtrip_negative["layer"] + len(input)
    _ = layer_negative_1
    serialization_negative_2 := perf_layer_serialization_base64_roundtrip_negative["serialization"] + len(input)
    _ = serialization_negative_2
    base64_negative_3 := perf_layer_serialization_base64_roundtrip_negative["base64"] + len(input)
    _ = base64_negative_3
    roundtrip_negative_4 := perf_layer_serialization_base64_roundtrip_negative["roundtrip"] + len(input)
    _ = roundtrip_negative_4
    binary_negative_5 := perf_layer_serialization_base64_roundtrip_negative["binary"] + len(input)
    _ = binary_negative_5
    return nil
}
